domain_archetypes.name: spott evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: spott signal changes while publicly context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: publicly boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: publicly handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: committed regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: committed behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: agentic operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: agentic output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
